title: User Awareness
description: User presence awareness configuration for real-time collaborative editing including cursor display, selection highlighting, avatar rendering, and collaborator visualization preferences

enablePresenceIndicators.title: Enable Presence Indicators
enablePresenceIndicators.description: Show visual indicators for collaborator presence, including cursors, selections, and activity status

enableCursorTracking.title: Enable Cursor Tracking
enableCursorTracking.description: Track and display cursor positions of all collaborators in real-time

enableSelectionTracking.title: Enable Selection Tracking
enableSelectionTracking.description: Track and display text selections made by all collaborators

enableActivityTracking.title: Enable Activity Tracking
enableActivityTracking.description: Track and display user activity status (editing, viewing, executing, etc.)

updateThrottleMs.title: Update Throttle (ms)
updateThrottleMs.description: Time in milliseconds to throttle awareness updates to prevent excessive network traffic

heartbeatInterval.title: Heartbeat Interval (ms)
heartbeatInterval.description: Time in milliseconds between heartbeat signals to maintain user presence

inactivityTimeout.title: Inactivity Timeout (ms)
inactivityTimeout.description: Time in milliseconds after which a user is considered inactive

presenceTimeout.title: Presence Timeout (ms)
presenceTimeout.description: Time in milliseconds after which user presence information expires

maxUsers.title: Maximum Users
maxUsers.description: Maximum number of users to track simultaneously in awareness system

colorPalette.title: User Color Palette
colorPalette.description: Array of colors used for user presence indicators (cursors, selections, avatars)

cursorDisplaySettings.title: Cursor Display Settings
cursorDisplaySettings.description: Configuration for cursor position display and behavior

showCursorLabel.title: Show Cursor Label
showCursorLabel.description: Display user name next to cursor position

cursorFadeTimeout.title: Cursor Fade Timeout (ms)
cursorFadeTimeout.description: Time in milliseconds before cursor fades out when inactive

cursorBlinkRate.title: Cursor Blink Rate (ms)
cursorBlinkRate.description: Time in milliseconds between cursor blinks for active users

cursorWidth.title: Cursor Width (px)
cursorWidth.description: Width of cursor indicator in pixels

cursorHeight.title: Cursor Height (px)
cursorHeight.description: Height of cursor indicator in pixels

selectionDisplaySettings.title: Selection Display Settings
selectionDisplaySettings.description: Configuration for text selection highlighting and display

selectionOpacity.title: Selection Opacity
selectionOpacity.description: Opacity level for selection highlighting (0.0 to 1.0)

selectionBorderWidth.title: Selection Border Width (px)
selectionBorderWidth.description: Width of selection border in pixels

showSelectionLabel.title: Show Selection Label
showSelectionLabel.description: Display user name for text selections

selectionFadeTimeout.title: Selection Fade Timeout (ms)
selectionFadeTimeout.description: Time in milliseconds before selection fades out when inactive

avatarDisplaySettings.title: Avatar Display Settings
avatarDisplaySettings.description: Configuration for user avatar rendering and display

showAvatars.title: Show Avatars
showAvatars.description: Display user avatars in presence indicators

avatarSize.title: Avatar Size (px)
avatarSize.description: Size of user avatars in pixels

avatarBorderWidth.title: Avatar Border Width (px)
avatarBorderWidth.description: Width of avatar border in pixels

showOnlineStatus.title: Show Online Status
showOnlineStatus.description: Display online/offline status indicator on avatars

fallbackToInitials.title: Fallback to Initials
fallbackToInitials.description: Use user initials when avatar image is not available

collaboratorVisualizationSettings.title: Collaborator Visualization Settings
collaboratorVisualizationSettings.description: Configuration for overall collaborator visualization preferences

showCollaboratorList.title: Show Collaborator List
showCollaboratorList.description: Display list of active collaborators in the UI

collaboratorListPosition.title: Collaborator List Position
collaboratorListPosition.description: Position of collaborator list in the interface

maxCollaboratorsShown.title: Maximum Collaborators Shown
maxCollaboratorsShown.description: Maximum number of collaborators to display in the list

showActivityIcons.title: Show Activity Icons
showActivityIcons.description: Display activity icons next to collaborator names

showLastSeenTime.title: Show Last Seen Time
showLastSeenTime.description: Display last seen timestamp for inactive users

animatePresenceChanges.title: Animate Presence Changes
animatePresenceChanges.description: Use animations for presence change indicators

performanceSettings.title: Performance Settings
performanceSettings.description: Configuration for awareness system performance optimization

awarenessUpdateInterval.title: Awareness Update Interval (ms)
awarenessUpdateInterval.description: Time in milliseconds between awareness state updates (must be <200ms per F-025-RQ-001)

renderingThrottleMs.title: Rendering Throttle (ms)
renderingThrottleMs.description: Time in milliseconds to throttle UI rendering updates

maxConcurrentUpdates.title: Max Concurrent Updates
maxConcurrentUpdates.description: Maximum number of concurrent awareness updates to process

enableUpdateBatching.title: Enable Update Batching
enableUpdateBatching.description: Batch multiple awareness updates for improved performance

batchUpdateSize.title: Batch Update Size
batchUpdateSize.description: Number of updates to batch together when batching is enabled

reconnectionSettings.title: Reconnection Settings
reconnectionSettings.description: Configuration for awareness system reconnection behavior

reconnectDelay.title: Reconnect Delay (ms)
reconnectDelay.description: Time in milliseconds to wait before attempting reconnection

maxReconnectAttempts.title: Max Reconnect Attempts
maxReconnectAttempts.description: Maximum number of reconnection attempts before giving up

exponentialBackoff.title: Exponential Backoff
exponentialBackoff.description: Use exponential backoff for reconnection attempts

maxBackoffDelay.title: Max Backoff Delay (ms)
maxBackoffDelay.description: Maximum delay for exponential backoff in milliseconds
